benchmark_intent: Verify whether the emergency under-curve research construction patch can push at least one regular AI empire to 3,000+ monthly research before 2350 without hidden bonuses.

settings.gigastructural_engineering_preset: Arcade unless startup modal records otherwise

target_game_version: Repo target Stellaris 4.4.5; prior live runtime displayed Pegasus v4.4.4 (7d82), recheck at launch
